title: ELF: Embedded Language Flows
content:
ELF: Embedded Language Flows
Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in applying them to language modeling. Unlike their image-domain counterparts, today's leading diffusion langua
author: Keya Hu, Linlu Qiu, Yiyang Lu
arxiv_summary: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in applying them to language modeling. Unlike their image-domain counterparts, today's leading diffusion langua
title_ja: ELF: 埋め込み型言語フロー
arxiv_summary_ja: 拡散モデルとフローベースモデルは、画像や動画のような領域で連続データを生成するためのデファクトスタンダードなアプローチとなっている。その成功は、これらを言語モデリングに応用することへの関心を高めている。画像領域の対応物とは異なり、今日の主要な拡散言語モデルは

title: Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting
content:
Variational Inference for Lévy Process-Driven SDEs via Neural Tilting
Modelling extreme events and heavy-tailed phenomena is central to building reliable predictive systems in domains such as finance, climate science, and safety-critical AI. While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-d
author: Yaman Kindap, Manfred Opper, Benjamin Dupuis

While Lévy processes provide a natural mathematical framework for capturing jumps and heavy tails, Bayesian inference for Lévy-d
title_ja: ニューラル傾斜を用いたレヴィ過程駆動SDEの変分推論

title: Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition
content:
Confidence-Guided Diffusion Augmentation for Enhanced Bangla Compound Character Recognition
Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across
author: Md. Sultan Al Rayhan, Maheen Islam
arxiv_summary: Recognition of handwritten Bangla compound characters remains a challenging problem due to complex character structures, large intra-class variation, and limited availability of high-quality annotated data. Existing Bangla handwritten character recognition systems often struggle to generalize across
title_ja: バングラ複合文字認識を強化するための信頼度誘導型拡散拡張
arxiv_summary_ja: 手書きのバングラ複合文字の認識は、複雑な文字構造、大きなクラス内変動、および高品質な注釈付きデータの入手可能性が限られているため、依然として困難な問題である。既存のバングラ手書き文字認識システムは、しばしば汎化に苦労しており

title: Shepherd: A Runtime Substrate Empowering Meta-Agents with a Formalized Execution Trace
content:
Shepherd: A Runtime Substrate Empowering Meta-Agents with a Formalized Execution Trace
We introduce Shepherd, a functional programming model that formalizes meta-agent operations on target agents as functions, with core operations mechanized in Lean. Shepherd records every agent-environment interaction as a typed event in a Git-like execution trace, enabling any past state to be forke
author: Simon Yu, Derek Chong, Ananjan Nandi
arxiv_summary: We introduce Shepherd, a functional programming model that formalizes meta-agent operations on target agents as functions, with core operations mechanized in Lean. Shepherd records every agent-environment interaction as a typed event in a Git-like execution trace, enabling any past state to be forke
title_ja: Shepherd: 形式化された実行トレースでメタエージェントを強化するランタイム基盤
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、ターゲットエージェント上でのメタエージェント操作を関数として形式化し、主要な操作をLeanで機械化した関数型プログラミングモデルであるShepherdを紹介する。Shepherdは、すべてのエージェントと環境の相互作用を型付けされたイベントとしてGitライクな実行トレースに記録し、過去のどの状態もフォークできるようにする。

title: Engineering Robustness into Personal Agents with the AI Workflow Store
content:
Engineering Robustness into Personal Agents with the AI Workflow Store
The dominant paradigm for AI agents is an "on-the-fly" loop in which agents synthesize plans and execute actions within seconds or minutes in response to user prompts. We argue that this paradigm short-circuits disciplined software engineering (SE) processes -- iterative design, rigorous testing, ad
author: Roxana Geambasu, Mariana Raykova, Pierre Tholoniat
arxiv_summary: The dominant paradigm for AI agents is an "on-the-fly" loop in which agents synthesize plans and execute actions within seconds or minutes in response to user prompts. We argue that this paradigm short-circuits disciplined software engineering (SE) processes -- iterative design, rigorous testing, ad
title_ja: AIワークフローストアでパーソナルエージェントにロバスト性を組み込む
arxiv_summary_ja: AIエージェントの支配的なパラダイムは、「その場限り」のループであり、エージェントはユーザーのプロンプトに応じて数秒または数分以内に計画を合成し、アクションを実行する。我々はこのパラダイムが、反復設計、厳密なテスト、などの規律あるソフトウェア工学（SE）プロセスを迂回していると主張する。

title: DataMaster: Towards Autonomous Data Engineering for Machine Learning
content:
DataMaster: Towards Autonomous Data Engineering for Machine Learning
As model families, training recipes, and compute budgets become increasingly standardized, further gains in machine learning systems depend increasingly on data. Yet data engineering remains largely manual and ad hoc: practitioners repeatedly search for external datasets, adapt them to existing pipe
author: Yaxin Du, Xiyuan Yang, Zhifan Zhou
arxiv_summary: As model families, training recipes, and compute budgets become increasingly standardized, further gains in machine learning systems depend increasingly on data. Yet data engineering remains largely manual and ad hoc: practitioners repeatedly search for external datasets, adapt them to existing pipe
title_ja: DataMaster: 機械学習のための自律的なデータエンジニアリングに向けて
arxiv_summary_ja: モデルファミリー、訓練レシピ、計算予算がますます標準化されるにつれて、機械学習システムのさらなる進歩はデータにますます依存するようになる。しかし、データエンジニアリングは依然として主に手動でアドホックである。実務者は繰り返し外部データセットを検索し、既存のパイプに適合させ

title: Unmasking On-Policy Distillation: Where It Helps, Where It Hurts, and Why
content:
Unmasking On-Policy Distillation: Where It Helps, Where It Hurts, and Why
On-policy distillation offers dense, per-token supervision for training reasoning models; however, it remains unclear under which conditions this signal is beneficial and under which it is detrimental. Which teacher model should be used, and in the case of self-distillation, which specific context s
author: Mohammadreza Armandpour, Fatih Ilhan, David Harrison
arxiv_summary: On-policy distillation offers dense, per-token supervision for training reasoning models; however, it remains unclear under which conditions this signal is beneficial and under which it is detrimental. Which teacher model should be used, and in the case of self-distillation, which specific context s
title_ja: オンポリシー蒸留の解明: どこで役立ち、どこで有害か、そしてその理由
arxiv_summary_ja: オンポリシー蒸留は、推論モデルのトレーニングのために密な、トークンごとの教師信号を提供する。しかし、この信号がどのような条件下で有益であり、どのような条件下で有害であるかは不明確なままである。どの教師モデルを使用すべきか、そして自己蒸留の場合、どの特定のコンテキストが

title: Shields to Guarantee Probabilistic Safety in MDPs
content:
Shields to Guarantee Probabilistic Safety in MDPs
Shielding is a prominent model-based technique to ensure safety of autonomous agents. Classical shielding aims to ensure that nothing bad ever happens and comes with strong guarantees about safety and maximal permissiveness. However, shielding systems for probabilistic safety, where something bad is
author: Linus Heck, Filip Macák, Roman Andriushchenko
arxiv_summary: Shielding is a prominent model-based technique to ensure safety of autonomous agents. Classical shielding aims to ensure that nothing bad ever happens and comes with strong guarantees about safety and maximal permissiveness. However, shielding systems for probabilistic safety, where something bad is
title_ja: MDPにおける確率的安全性保証のためのシールド
arxiv_summary_ja: シールドは、自律エージェントの安全性を確保するための著名なモデルベース手法である。古典的なシールドは、何も悪いことが起こらないことを保証し、安全性と最大の許容性について強力な保証を提供する。しかし、確率的安全性（何か悪いことが起こる可能性がある）のためのシールドシステムは

title: LoKA: Low-precision Kernel Applications for Recommendation Models At Scale
content:
LoKA: Low-precision Kernel Applications for Recommendation Models At Scale
Recent GPU generations deliver significantly higher FLOPs using lower-precision arithmetic, such as FP8. While successfully applied to large language models (LLMs), its adoption in large recommendation models (LRMs) has been limited. This is because LRMs are numerically sensitive, dominated by small
author: Liang Luo, Yinbin Ma, Quanyu Zhu
arxiv_summary: Recent GPU generations deliver significantly higher FLOPs using lower-precision arithmetic, such as FP8. While successfully applied to large language models (LLMs), its adoption in large recommendation models (LRMs) has been limited. This is because LRMs are numerically sensitive, dominated by small
title_ja: LoKA: 大規模推薦モデルのための低精度カーネルアプリケーション
arxiv_summary_ja: 最新のGPU世代は、FP8などの低精度演算を使用して大幅に高いFLOPsを提供する。大規模言語モデル（LLM）には成功裏に適用されているが、大規模推薦モデル（LRM）での採用は限定的である。これは、LRMが数値的に敏感であり、小さな

title: AssayBench: An Assay-Level Virtual Cell Benchmark for LLMs and Agents
content:
AssayBench: An Assay-Level Virtual Cell Benchmark for LLMs and Agents
Recent advances in machine learning and large-scale biological data collections have revived the prospect of building a virtual cell, a computational model of cellular behavior that could accelerate biological discovery. One of the most compelling promises of this vision is the ability to perform in
author: Edward De Brouwer, Carl Edwards, Alexander Wu
arxiv_summary: Recent advances in machine learning and large-scale biological data collections have revived the prospect of building a virtual cell, a computational model of cellular behavior that could accelerate biological discovery. One of the most compelling promises of this vision is the ability to perform in
title_ja: AssayBench: LLMとエージェントのためのアッセイレベル仮想細胞ベンチマーク
arxiv_summary_ja: 機械学習と大規模生物学的データ収集における最近の進歩は、生物学的発見を加速しうる細胞行動の計算モデルである仮想細胞を構築する可能性を再び高めている。このビジョンの最も魅力的な約束の一つは、…の能力である。

title: DECO: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with Dense-Comparable Performance on End-Side Devices
content:
DECO: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with Dense-Comparable Performance on End-Side Devices
While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales model capacity without proportionally increasing computation, its massive total parameter footprint creates significant storage and memory-access bottlenecks, which hinder efficient end-side deployment that simultaneously requires high performance, low computati
author: Chenyang Song, Weilin Zhao, Xu Han
arxiv_summary: While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales model capacity without proportionally increasing computation, its massive total parameter footprint creates significant storage and memory-access bottlenecks, which hinder efficient end-side deployment that simultaneously requires high performance, low computati
title_ja: DECO: エンドサイドデバイス上で密モデルに匹敵する性能を持つ疎なMixture-of-Experts
arxiv_summary_ja: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) は、計算量を比例的に増加させることなくモデル容量をスケーリングするが、その巨大な総パラメータフットプリントは、ストレージとメモリアクセスの重大なボトルネックを生み出す。これは、高い性能、低い計算量、を同時に必要とする効率的なエンドサイド展開を妨げ

title: Quantifying Concentration Phenomena of Mean-Field Transformers in the Low-Temperature Regime
content:
Quantifying Concentration Phenomena of Mean-Field Transformers in the Low-Temperature Regime
Transformers with self-attention modules as their core components have become an integral architecture in modern large language and foundation models. In this paper, we study the evolution of tokens in deep encoder-only transformers at inference time which is described in the large-token limit by a
author: Albert Alcalde, Leon Bungert, Konstantin Riedl
arxiv_summary: Transformers with self-attention modules as their core components have become an integral architecture in modern large language and foundation models. In this paper, we study the evolution of tokens in deep encoder-only transformers at inference time which is described in the large-token limit by a
title_ja: 低温領域における平均場トランスフォーマーの集中現象の定量化
arxiv_summary_ja: 自己注意モジュールをコアコンポーネントとするトランスフォーマーは、現代の大規模言語モデルや基盤モデルにおいて不可欠なアーキテクチャとなっている。本論文では、推論時における深いエンコーダーオンリートランスフォーマーにおけるトークンの進化を研究する。これは、大規模トークン限界において…によって記述される。

title: Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
content:
Dynamic Skill Lifecycle Management for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
Large language model agents increasingly rely on external skills to solve complex tasks, where skills act as modular units that extend their capabilities beyond what parametric memory alone supports. Existing methods assume external skills either accumulate as persistent guidance or internalized int
author: Junhao Shen, Teng Zhang, Xiaoyan Zhao
arxiv_summary: Large language model agents increasingly rely on external skills to solve complex tasks, where skills act as modular units that extend their capabilities beyond what parametric memory alone supports. Existing methods assume external skills either accumulate as persistent guidance or internalized int
title_ja: エージェント強化学習のための動的スキルライフサイクル管理
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデルエージェントは、複雑なタスクを解決するために外部スキルへの依存度を高めている。スキルは、パラメトリックメモリ単独でサポートできる範囲を超えて、エージェントの能力を拡張するモジュール式の単位として機能する。既存の手法では、外部スキルが永続的なガイダンスとして蓄積されるか、または内部化されると仮定している。

title: Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges
content:
Optimal and Scalable MAPF via Multi-Marginal Optimal Transport and Schrödinger Bridges
We consider anonymous multi-agent path finding (MAPF) where a set of robots is tasked to travel to a set of targets on a finite, connected graph. We show that MAPF can be cast as a special class of multi-marginal optimal transport (MMOT) problems with an underlying Markovian structure, under which t
author: Usman A. Khan, Joseph W. Durham
arxiv_summary: We consider anonymous multi-agent path finding (MAPF) where a set of robots is tasked to travel to a set of targets on a finite, connected graph. We show that MAPF can be cast as a special class of multi-marginal optimal transport (MMOT) problems with an underlying Markovian structure, under which t
title_ja: 多辺縁最適輸送とシュレーディンガーブリッジによる最適かつスケーラブルなMAPF
arxiv_summary_ja: 我々は、有限かつ連結なグラフ上で一連のロボットが一連のターゲットへ移動する匿名マルチエージェント経路探索（MAPF）を考察する。MAPFが、基礎となるマルコフ構造を持つ多辺縁最適輸送（MMOT）問題の特殊なクラスとして定式化できることを示す。その下で

title: Equivariant Reinforcement Learning for Clifford Quantum Circuit Synthesis
content:
Equivariant Reinforcement Learning for Clifford Quantum Circuit Synthesis
We consider the problem of synthesizing Clifford quantum circuits for devices with all-to-all qubit connectivity. We approach this task as a reinforcement learning problem in which an agent learns to discover a sequence of elementary Clifford gates that reduces a given symplectic matrix representati
author: Richie Yeung, Aleks Kissinger, Rob Cornish
arxiv_summary: We consider the problem of synthesizing Clifford quantum circuits for devices with all-to-all qubit connectivity. We approach this task as a reinforcement learning problem in which an agent learns to discover a sequence of elementary Clifford gates that reduces a given symplectic matrix representati
title_ja: クリフォード量子回路合成のための同変強化学習
arxiv_summary_ja: 全結合キュービット接続性を持つデバイスのためのクリフォード量子回路合成の問題を考察する。我々はこのタスクを強化学習問題として扱う。この問題では、エージェントは与えられたシンプレクティック行列表現を削減する一連の基本的なクリフォードゲートを発見することを学習する。

title: Revisiting Policy Gradients for Restricted Policy Classes: Escaping Myopic Local Optima with $k$-step Policy Gradients
content:
Revisiting Policy Gradients for Restricted Policy Classes: Escaping Myopic Local Optima with $k$-step Policy Gradients
This work revisits standard policy gradient methods used on restricted policy classes, which are known to get stuck in suboptimal critical points. We identify an important cause for this phenomenon to be that the policy gradient is itself fundamentally myopic, i.e. it only improves the policy based
author: Alex DeWeese, Guannan Qu
arxiv_summary: This work revisits standard policy gradient methods used on restricted policy classes, which are known to get stuck in suboptimal critical points. We identify an important cause for this phenomenon to be that the policy gradient is itself fundamentally myopic, i.e. it only improves the policy based
title_ja: 制限されたポリシー選択肢に対するポリシー勾配の再検討：kステップポリシー勾配による近視眼的な局所最適からの脱却
arxiv_summary_ja: 本研究は、準最適臨界点に陥ることが知られている、制限されたポリシー選択肢に用いられる標準的なポリシー勾配法を再検討する。この現象の重要な原因として、ポリシー勾配自体が根本的に近視眼的であること、すなわちポリシーを…に基づいてのみ改善することであることを特定する。

title: Beyond Red-Teaming: Formal Guarantees of LLM Guardrail Classifiers
content:
Beyond Red-Teaming: Formal Guarantees of LLM Guardrail Classifiers
Guardrail Classifiers defend production language models against harmful behavior, but although results seem promising in testing, they provide no formal guarantees. Providing formal guarantees for such models is hard because "harmful behavior" has no natural specification in a discrete input space:
author: Nikita Kezins, Urbas Ekka, Pascal Berrang
arxiv_summary: Guardrail Classifiers defend production language models against harmful behavior, but although results seem promising in testing, they provide no formal guarantees. Providing formal guarantees for such models is hard because "harmful behavior" has no natural specification in a discrete input space:
title_ja: レッドチームを超えて：LLMガードレール分類器の形式的保証
arxiv_summary_ja: ガードレール分類器は、有害な行動からプロダクション言語モデルを防御するが、テストでは有望な結果を示すものの、形式的な保証は提供しない。「有害な行動」が離散的な入力空間で自然な仕様を持たないため、このようなモデルに形式的な保証を提供することは難しい。

title: WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
content:
WildClawBench: A Benchmark for Real-World, Long-Horizon Agent Evaluation
Large language and vision-language models increasingly power agents that act on a user's behalf through command-line interface (CLI) harnesses. However, most agent benchmarks still rely on synthetic sandboxes, short-horizon tasks, mock-service APIs, and final-answer checks, leaving open whether agen
author: Shuangrui Ding, Xuanlang Dai, Long Xing
arxiv_summary: Large language and vision-language models increasingly power agents that act on a user's behalf through command-line interface (CLI) harnesses. However, most agent benchmarks still rely on synthetic sandboxes, short-horizon tasks, mock-service APIs, and final-answer checks, leaving open whether agen
title_ja: WildClawBench: 実世界の長期的エージェント評価のためのベンチマーク
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデルと視覚言語モデルは、コマンドラインインターフェース（CLI）ハーネスを介してユーザーに代わって動作するエージェントの力をますます高めている。しかし、ほとんどのエージェントベンチマークは依然として、合成サンドボックス、短期間のタスク、モックサービスAPI、および最終回答チェックに依存しており、エージェントが

title: RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards
content:
RubricEM: Meta-RL with Rubric-guided Policy Decomposition beyond Verifiable Rewards
Training deep research agents, namely systems that plan, search, evaluate evidence, and synthesize long-form reports, pushes reinforcement learning beyond the regime of verifiable rewards. Their outputs lack ground-truth answers, their trajectories span many tool-augmented decisions, and standard po
author: Gaotang Li, Bhavana Dalvi Mishra, Zifeng Wang
arxiv_summary: Training deep research agents, namely systems that plan, search, evaluate evidence, and synthesize long-form reports, pushes reinforcement learning beyond the regime of verifiable rewards. Their outputs lack ground-truth answers, their trajectories span many tool-augmented decisions, and standard po
title_ja: RubricEM: 検証可能な報酬を超えたルーブリック誘導型ポリシー分解を用いたメタRL
arxiv_summary_ja: 深層研究エージェント、すなわち計画、探索、証拠評価、長文レポートの合成を行うシステムを訓練することは、強化学習を検証可能な報酬の領域を超えたものにする。彼らの出力には真の答えがなく、彼らの軌跡は多くのツール拡張された決定に及び、標準的なポリシー

title: Grounded or Guessing? LVLM Confidence Estimation via Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking
content:
Grounded or Guessing? LVLM Confidence Estimation via Blind-Image Contrastive Ranking
Large vision-language models suffer from visual ungroundedness: they can produce a fluent, confident, and even correct response driven entirely by language priors, with the image contributing nothing to the prediction. Existing confidence estimation methods cannot detect this, as they observe model
author: Reza Khanmohammadi, Erfan Miahi, Simerjot Kaur
arxiv_summary: Large vision-language models suffer from visual ungroundedness: they can produce a fluent, confident, and even correct response driven entirely by language priors, with the image contributing nothing to the prediction. Existing confidence estimation methods cannot detect this, as they observe model
title_ja: 根拠があるのか、推測なのか？盲画像対照ランキングによるLVLMの信頼度推定
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模視覚言語モデルは、視覚的な根拠の欠如に悩まされている。画像が予測に全く貢献せず、言語の事前情報のみによって流暢で自信に満ちた、さらには正しい応答を生成できることがある。既存の信頼度推定方法は、モデルが…を観察するため、これを検出できない。

title: Neural at ArchEHR-QA 2026: One Method Fits All: Unified Prompt Optimization for Clinical QA over EHRs
content:
Neural at ArchEHR-QA 2026: One Method Fits All: Unified Prompt Optimization for Clinical QA over EHRs
Automated question answering (QA) over electronic health records (EHRs) demands precise evidence retrieval, faithful answer generation, and explicit grounding of answers in clinical notes. In this work, we present Neural1.5, our method for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task at CL4Health@LREC 2026, whic
author: Abrar Majeedi, Viswanatha Reddy Gajjala, Sai Prasanna Teja Reddy Bogireddy
arxiv_summary: Automated question answering (QA) over electronic health records (EHRs) demands precise evidence retrieval, faithful answer generation, and explicit grounding of answers in clinical notes. In this work, we present Neural1.5, our method for the ArchEHR-QA 2026 shared task at CL4Health@LREC 2026, whic
title_ja: ArchEHR-QA 2026におけるNeural: すべてに適合する単一手法: EHRにおける臨床QAのための統合プロンプト最適化
arxiv_summary_ja: 電子健康記録（EHR）に対する自動質問応答（QA）は、正確な証拠検索、忠実な回答生成、および臨床ノートにおける回答の明示的な根拠付けを必要とする。本研究では、CL4Health@LREC 2026におけるArchEHR-QA 2026共有タスクのための我々の手法であるNeural1.5を提示する。

title: Compute Where it Counts: Self Optimizing Language Models
content:
Compute Where it Counts: Self Optimizing Language Models
Efficient LLM inference research has largely focused on reducing the cost of each decoding step (e.g., using quantization, pruning, or sparse attention), typically applying a uniform computation budget to every generated token. In practice, token difficulty varies widely, so static compression can o
author: Yash Akhauri, Mohamed S. Abdelfattah
arxiv_summary: Efficient LLM inference research has largely focused on reducing the cost of each decoding step (e.g., using quantization, pruning, or sparse attention), typically applying a uniform computation budget to every generated token. In practice, token difficulty varies widely, so static compression can o
title_ja: 重要な箇所で計算する：自己最適化言語モデル
arxiv_summary_ja: 効率的なLLM推論の研究は、主に各デコードステップのコスト削減（例：量子化、プルーニング、疎なアテンションの使用）に焦点を当てており、通常、生成されるすべてのトークンに一様な計算予算を適用している。実際には、トークンの難易度は大きく異なるため、静的な圧縮では

title: DGPO: Beyond Pairwise Preferences with Directional Consistent Groupwise Optimization
content:
DGPO: Beyond Pairwise Preferences with Directional Consistent Groupwise Optimization
Although Large Language Models (LLMs) have made remarkable progress, current preference optimization methods still struggle to align directional consistency while preserving reasoning diversity. To address this limitation, we propose Directional-Groupwise Preference Optimization (DGPO), a lightweigh
author: Mengyi Deng, Zhiwei Li, Xin Li
arxiv_summary: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) have made remarkable progress, current preference optimization methods still struggle to align directional consistency while preserving reasoning diversity. To address this limitation, we propose Directional-Groupwise Preference Optimization (DGPO), a lightweigh
title_ja: DGPO: 方向性の一貫性を持つグループワイズ最適化によるペアワイズ嗜好を超えて
arxiv_summary_ja: 大規模言語モデル（LLM）は目覚ましい進歩を遂げているが、現在の嗜好最適化手法は、推論の多様性を保持しつつ方向性の一貫性を整合させるのに依然として苦戦している。この制限に対処するため、我々は軽量な方向性グループワイズ嗜好最適化（DGPO）を提案する。

title: RUBEN: Rule-Based Explanations for Retrieval-Augmented LLM Systems
content:
RUBEN: Rule-Based Explanations for Retrieval-Augmented LLM Systems
This paper demonstrates RUBEN, an interactive tool for discovering minimal rules to explain the outputs of retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) in data-driven applications. We leverage novel pruning strategies to efficiently identify a minimal set of rules that subsume all others. We fur
author: Joel Rorseth, Parke Godfrey, Lukasz Golab
arxiv_summary: This paper demonstrates RUBEN, an interactive tool for discovering minimal rules to explain the outputs of retrieval-augmented large language models (LLMs) in data-driven applications. We leverage novel pruning strategies to efficiently identify a minimal set of rules that subsume all others. We fur
title_ja: RUBEN: 検索拡張型LLMシステムのためのルールベースの解説
arxiv_summary_ja: 本論文では、データ駆動型アプリケーションにおける検索拡張型大規模言語モデル（LLM）の出力を説明するための最小限のルールを発見する対話型ツールRUBENを紹介する。我々は、新しいプルーニング戦略を活用して、他のすべてのルールを包含する最小限のルールセットを効率的に特定する。さらに、我々は
